title: Director Refactors Legacy Code
description: The Director must identify code smells and propose safe, incremental refactoring without breaking functionality.
prompt: Analyze the code in src/ directory. Identify top 3 code smells and create a refactoring plan. Return JSON: {smells: [{location, type, risk}], plan: [{step, files, risk_level}], tests_needed: [string]}. Prioritize low-risk, high-impact changes.
